mapper.select: SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.review_id ASC

SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'ACTIVE'
AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 7 DAY)
AND r.created_at >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
ORDER BY r.view_count DESC, r.title ASC
SELECT r.*, m.nickname FROM review r JOIN member m ON r.member_id = m.member_id WHERE r.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY r.rating DESC, r.title ASC

select r.*, m.nickname, re.title AS main_title from review r join member m on r.member_id = m.member_id join recipe re on r.recipe_id = re.recipe_id where 1=1
and (m.nickname like #{keyword} or re.title like #{keyword} )
and status = #{status}
order by b.created_date asc
order by b.created_date desc
order by b.view_count desc
limit #{size} offset #{offset}
select re.*, m.nickname from review re join member m on re.member_id = m.member_id left join recipe r on re.recipe_id = r.recipe_id where re.review_id = #{review_id}
mapper.update: update review set status = #{status} where review_id = #{review_id}
